verses.1: For the music director; on the Gittith. A Psalm of David. LORD, our Lord, How majestic is Your name in all the earth, You who have displayed Your splendor above the heavens!
verses.2: From the mouths of infants and nursing babies You have established strength Because of Your enemies, To do away with the enemy and the revengeful.
verses.3: When I consider Your heavens, the work of Your fingers, The moon and the stars, which You have set in place;
verses.4: What is man that You think of him, And a son of man that You are concerned about him?
verses.5: Yet You have made him a little lower than God, And You crown him with glory and majesty!
verses.6: You have him rule over the works of Your hands; You have put everything under his feet,
verses.7: All sheep and oxen, And also the animals of the field,
verses.8: The birds of the sky, and the fish of the sea, Whatever passes through the paths of the seas.
verses.9: LORD, our Lord, How majestic is Your name in all the earth!
